name: KRUKENBERG TUMOR
definition: metastatic ovarian adenocarcinoma most commonly originating in GI tract

demographics.Age: any age, most common in 5th-6th decade

dominant_finding: variable hypointensity on T2WI ← mucin-filled signet-ring cells + abundant collagen
distribution: solid mass + intratumoral cysts; in 60-80% bilateral
discriminating_features: solid mass + intratumoral cysts; in 60-80% bilateral
variable hypointensity on T2WI ← mucin-filled signet-ring cells + abundant collagen
moderate to marked enhancement of solid components

general: solid mass + intratumoral cysts; in 60-80% bilateral
MR: variable hypointensity on T2WI ← mucin-filled signet-ring cells + abundant collagen
moderate to marked enhancement of solid components
